nasb.text: I made it beautiful with the multitude of its branches, And all the trees of Eden, which were in the garden of God, were jealous of it.

esv.text: I made it beautiful in the mass of its branches, and all the trees of Eden envied it, that were in the garden of God.

cnv.text: 我使它因枝條繁多而顯得秀美， 以致在　神的園中，伊甸所有的樹木都嫉妒它。

ccb.text: 我使它枝繁叶茂，美丽无比， 以致上帝伊甸园里的树木都羡慕它。’
